calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Modsquad, Inc. To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Scratch Services, Llc
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER MODSQUAD, INC., DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS METAVERSE MOD SQUAD's Hearing On Petition Of Modsquad, Inc. To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Scratch Services, Llc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted, including the unopposed attorney fees and costs sought.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
